creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Created attachment 249754
make portmaster happy again.

The port fails to install when ports-mgmt/portmaster is used as the prefered tool. A quick and easy workaround is to replace ${SETNEV} with ${SETENVI} in the Makefile wherever a build process is triggered, patch applied!

[...]
: invalid option -- D
Usage: gmake [options] [target] ...
